name: finish-epics
description: Finish str-fpgb and str-3ky9 epics - 4 parallel leaf issues

members.name: conformance
members.prompt:
You are working on issue str-fpgb.6: Frontend conformance harness.

**Goal**: Build a black-box protocol conformance harness that runs the same NDJSON request/response cases against each frontend subprocess (TS, Go, Rust, noop) and reports behavioral drift.

**Acceptance criteria**:
- Shared conformance cases run against TS, Go, Rust, and the noop frontend
- Protocol field mismatches fail the harness
- Expected dynamic fields are normalized explicitly

**Context**: This is P1 and blocks str-fpgb.7 (Rust frontend quality gate) and str-fpgb.9 (Protocol governance docs). The project already has:
- Protocol fixture corpus (str-fpgb.4, done)
- Schema fixture validator (str-fpgb.5, done)
- Error code contract parity (str-fpgb.2, done)
- Lifecycle schema coverage (str-fpgb.3, done)

Run `bd show str-fpgb.6` for full issue details. Study the existing protocol test infrastructure before planning.

**Your task**: Task #1 in the team task list. Claim it, plan your approach, implement, test, commit, and mark done. Follow all project conventions in CLAUDE.md. Run the relevant test tier before committing.

members.name: refactoring-recs
members.prompt:
You are working on issue str-3ky9.15: Refactoring recs for hard-to-mock deps.

**Goal**: Detect hard-to-mock calls (dynamic dispatch, closures, subprocess spawning, multi-layer indirection) and produce refactoring recommendations in scan output: extract to parameter, wrap in named function, move behind interface.

**Acceptance criteria**:
- Hard-to-mock calls detected
- Recommendations appear in scan report
- Suggestions are actionable (extract, wrap, interface)

**Context**: This depends on str-3ky9.12 (Execution-time dep gap detection, done). The project has existing mock infrastructure in shatter-core. Study the scan output format and existing mock detection before planning.

Run `bd show str-3ky9.15` for full issue details.

**Your task**: Task #2 in the team task list. Claim it, plan your approach, implement, test, commit, and mark done. Follow all project conventions in CLAUDE.md. Run the relevant test tier before committing.
